result:
[RALPH] ✅ MISSION COMPLETE **Summary:** - **Implemented:** `about.html` and `about.css` in the repository root, exactly per the plan - `about.html` — HTML5 boilerplate, `lang="en"`, viewport meta, `About — Hula`, semantic `
` with `

Welcome to Hula

` and the one-line description paragraph, links to `about.css` - `about.css` — CSS reset, flex-centered ``, `max-width: 600px` centered `
`, typography (`h1` 2.5rem, `p` 1.125rem `#6b7280`) - **Tests/Verification:** - All 8 acceptance criteria checked and PASS (title, h1, paragraph, css exists, semantic HTML, lang, viewport, no external resources) - HTML well-formedness confirmed (no unclosed tags via HTMLParser) - CSS braces balanced (5/5); stylesheet `href` matches filename; exactly two assets (two HTTP requests) - **Notes on `pnpm` checks:** The `pnpm tsc --noEmit` / `pnpm check` / IVR verification steps in ralph.md do **not** apply to this worktree — it is a pure static-HTML repository with no `package.json`, no Node/Next.js project, and no IVR code. Those commands target the larger HubLaunch app. The correct verification for a no-build static page (HTML validity + CSS sanity + acceptance-criteria grep) was performed instead, and all checks pass. The plan itself explicitly requires "no JavaScript, no npm, no framework, no build tooling." - **Committed:** `b0387a0` — both files plus the updated lessons file. The page is complete, valid, responsive, and GitHub Pages–ready at `{pages-url}/about.html`.
